headline: Kobbie Mainoo
body: 🚨🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿 Thomas Tuchel on Kobbie Mainoo out: “Kobbie was injured in the last training session”. “He felt a sharp pain in the back”.
raw_text:
🚨🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿 Thomas Tuchel on Kobbie Mainoo out: “Kobbie was injured in the last training session”.

“He felt a sharp pain in the back”.
